design_direction.typography: Clean sans-serif (Be Vietnam Pro for English, Noto Sans Arabic for Urdu)

bilingual_rules: English on top, Urdu translation directly below in smaller size
Urdu uses RTL layout where appropriate
Language toggle button (EN / اردو) on every screen's app bar
English body: 14-16sp, Urdu body: 13-15sp (bumped by 2px visually)

screens.name: ProvidersScreen
key_components: Amber info banner highlighting parsed search parameters
Provider list items styled like Careem ride selections

screens.name: ProviderDetailScreen
key_components: Profile header with avatar circle and name

screens.name: BookingConfirmationScreen
key_components: Animated success checkmark and booking code 526377
Receipt card with breakdown of dynamic factors

screens.name: FollowUpScreen
key_components: Interactive F-8 Islamabad map showing active route
Provider status sheet (En Route, Arrived, In Progress, Done)

screens.name: DisputeScreen
key_components: 2x2 dispute categories grid (Price, Quality, No-Show, Cancellation)

screens.name: BaselineCompareScreen
key_components: Features comparison table (Simple App vs. KhidmatAI)
Urdu parsing and dynamic shift success illustrations
CTAs driving onboarding and trust alignment

outcome: All 8 screens designed inside Stitch, matching specified colors and bilingual guidelines. Screen logic completely documented as local JSON configuration files in mobile/design/screens/ for direct ingestion in the upcoming Flutter implementation phase.
